history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed “LEVEL UP!” interface screen with a user progress panel and several numeric progress indicators.

Main Subject:
A rectangular, rounded-corner dashboard panel titled “Kayzzz” displays level and experience progress bars, along with several small statistic boxes.

Setting:
The scene appears to be a digital UI on a dark background with a purple-to-blue gradient. The time of day, weather, and physical environment are not applicable.

Visual Details:
At the top center, large gold text reads “LEVEL UP!” with small decorative diamond shapes on either side. Below, a large rounded rectangle contains the main content. On the left side inside the panel, there is a circular profile image with a purple border; the image includes stylized orange and yellow text and a graphic background, but the exact smaller text is unclear. Near the top left of the main panel, “Kayzzz” appears in large white text, with a small badge reading “#1” next to it. Under that, the label “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller muted text. In the center area, a purple rounded rectangle shows “LEVEL” and a large number “4.” To its right, a teal rounded rectangle shows “EXPERIENCE” and “18 / 250.” Beneath these, a horizontal progress bar is shown with a small purple segment on the left. On the right end of the progress bar area, “7%” appears in white. Below, three smaller rounded boxes display “MESSAGES 204,” “XP NEEDED 232,” and “NEXT LVL 5.” At the bottom of the panel, there is faint text reading “Congratulations on leveling up!” The layout is centered and symmetrical, with a dark purple palette and bright gold, white, purple, and teal accents. The camera angle is straight-on, like a screenshot.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayzzz
#1
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
4
EXPERIENCE
18 / 250
7%
MESSAGES 204
XP NEEDED 232
NEXT LVL 5
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
This image is a level-up dashboard showing the user “Kayzzz” with current level 4 and experience progress. It also lists messages, remaining XP needed, and the next level, all presented in a dark purple themed UI.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
